 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.11","title":"FAD: Move cline.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/cline.rs (1108 lines) to FAD.

CLINE CONNECTOR: Parses Cline (VS Code extension) session files from VS Code globalStorage. Navigates the .cline directory structure, parsing task directories with conversation data.

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- VS Code extension storage path detection (shares pattern with copilot, amp)
- May have complex workspace tracking logic
- Consider extracting shared VS Code path detection into a utility used by cline, copilot, and amp

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- ClineConnector compiles in FAD
- VS Code path detection works cross-platform

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.12","title":"FAD: Move amp.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/amp.rs (1291 lines) to FAD.

AMP CONNECTOR: Parses Amp (Sourcegraph) session data from ~/.local/share/amp and VS Code extension storage. Dual-source detection (standalone app + VS Code extension).

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- Dual-source: standalone app directory AND VS Code extension storage
- VS Code path detection shared with copilot, cline
- Agent metadata extraction specific to Amp's format
- May have platform-specific paths for standalone app

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- AmpConnector compiles in FAD
- Both standalone and VS Code sources detected

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.13","title":"FAD: Move pi_agent.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/pi_agent.rs (1395 lines) to FAD.

PI AGENT CONNECTOR: Parses Pi Agent session files from ~/.pi/agent/sessions/. Rich event structure with typed events: session_start, message, model_change, thinking_level_change. Extracts extended thinking content, flattens tool calls with arguments, tracks model changes.

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- Uses PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR env var override (already handled by FAD detection)
- Rich event parsing — more complex than simple message-based formats
- Extended thinking content extraction (unique to Pi Agent)
- Model change tracking within sessions
- Scans for *_*.jsonl pattern in sessions directory

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- PiAgentConnector compiles in FAD
- All event types parsed correctly
- Extended thinking content preserved
- cass imports from FAD, original removed","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:02:28.357315322Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:51.100508014Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["connector","fad","migration","pi_agent"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:02:28.357315322Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:34.579684595Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:34.692501616Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:34.808260373Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:34.919031043Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-6ecg5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:51.100335882Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","title":"FAD: Move claude_code.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/claude_code.rs (1465 lines) to FAD.

CLAUDE CODE CONNECTOR: Parses Claude Code session files from ~/.claude/projects/. This is the PRIMARY connector (most sessions come from Claude Code). Handles .jsonl, .json, and .claude file formats. Extracts workspace, session_id, git_branch metadata. Computes timestamp bounds for incremental indexing.

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- This is the highest-traffic connector — most users have the most Claude Code sessions
- Performance matters: scanning large numbers of JSONL files must be efficient
- The session directory structure is: ~/.claude/projects/<project-hash>/sessions/<session-id>/
- File format detection: .jsonl (primary), .json (older format), .claude (metadata)
- Metadata extraction includes git_branch, workspace path, session_id
- Incremental scan uses timestamp bounds to skip already-indexed sessions
- The connector_to_franken_slug mapping ('claude_code' -> 'claude') lives in this connector's detect() — after migration, this mapping is unnecessary since FAD owns both detection and scanning

PRIORITY: P1 because this is the most important connector by volume

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- ClaudeCodeConnector compiles in FAD
- All file formats (.jsonl, .json, .claude) parsed correctly
- Metadata extraction (workspace, session_id, git_branch) preserved
- Incremental scanning performance preserved
- cass imports from FAD, original removed","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:02:34.125245106Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-20T07:40:28.255408257Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["claude_code","connector","fad","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:02:34.125245106Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:35.034872676Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:35.152910239Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.25","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:50.433536213Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:35.264988837Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:35.380452062Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-6ecg5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:51.444654462Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.14","title":"FAD: Move claude_code.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/claude_code.rs (1465 lines) to FAD.

CLAUDE CODE CONNECTOR: Parses Claude Code session files from ~/.claude/projects/. This is the PRIMARY connector (most sessions come from Claude Code). Handles .jsonl, .json, and .claude file formats. Extracts workspace, session_id, git_branch metadata. Computes timestamp bounds for incremental indexing.

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- This is the highest-traffic connector — most users have the most Claude Code sessions
- Performance matters: scanning large numbers of JSONL files must be efficient
- The session directory structure is: ~/.claude/projects/<project-hash>/sessions/<session-id>/
- File format detection: .jsonl (primary), .json (older format), .claude (metadata)
- Metadata extraction includes git_branch, workspace path, session_id
- Incremental scan uses timestamp bounds to skip already-indexed sessions
- The connector_to_franken_slug mapping ('claude_code' -> 'claude') lives in this connector's detect() — after migration, this mapping is unnecessary since FAD owns both detection and scanning

PRIORITY: P1 because this is the most important connector by volume

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- ClaudeCodeConnector compiles in FAD
- All file formats (.jsonl, .json, .claude) parsed correctly
- Metadata extraction (workspace, session_id, git_branch) preserved
- Incremental scanning performance preserved

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.15","title":"FAD: Move gemini.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/gemini.rs (1594 lines) to FAD.

GEMINI CONNECTOR: Parses Gemini CLI session data from ~/.gemini/tmp/. Reads content.json files with a specific conversation structure. Handles metadata extraction and conversation reconstruction from Gemini's JSON format.

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- content.json format is specific to Gemini CLI
- Conversation reconstruction from multiple JSON objects may be complex
- Metadata extraction specific to Gemini's response format
- Timestamp handling may differ from JSONL-based connectors

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- GeminiConnector compiles in FAD
- content.json parsing produces identical output

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.16","title":"FAD: Move chatgpt.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/chatgpt.rs (1748 lines) to FAD. This is the MOST DEPENDENCY-HEAVY connector due to encryption.

CHATGPT CONNECTOR: Parses ChatGPT desktop app conversations. Three format versions:
- v1: Unencrypted JSON (legacy)
- v2: AES-256-GCM encrypted with PBKDF2 key derivation
- v3: Updated encryption scheme

KEY COMPLEXITY: Encryption/decryption requires:
- aes-gcm crate for AES-256-GCM
- pbkdf2 for key derivation (600,000 iterations)
- macOS keychain access for encryption key extraction (security CLI)
- CHATGPT_ENCRYPTION_KEY env var fallback
- Ring or similar for cryptographic primitives

LOCATION: ~/Library/Application Support/com.openai.chat/ (macOS)

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4, and specifically FAD task 3 (the 'chatgpt' feature flag with crypto deps)

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- This connector is macOS-heavy (Application Support path, keychain)
- Crypto deps are heavy — MUST be behind 'chatgpt' feature flag
- Key extraction from macOS keychain uses subprocess (security find-generic-password)
- The encryption scheme must be preserved EXACTLY — any change breaks decryption
- v1/v2/v3 format detection is order-sensitive
- This is a good test of the feature gating system — users on Linux who don't use ChatGPT desktop should not pull in crypto deps

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5, with extra attention to feature gating.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- ChatGPTConnector compiles in FAD behind 'chatgpt' feature
- All three format versions (v1, v2, v3) parse correctly
- Encryption/decryption produces identical results
- Keychain access works on macOS
- Env var fallback works on all platforms
- NOT compiled when 'chatgpt' feature is disabled
- cass imports from FAD, original removed","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:03:08.901969436Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:52.120501041Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["chatgpt","connector","crypto","fad","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:03:08.901969436Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:35.952238682Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:36.065611943Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:36.179618080Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:05:36.291842171Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-6ecg5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:52.120363814Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-1u2f7.17","title":"FAD: Move codex.rs connector to franken_agent_detection","description":"WHAT: Move src/connectors/codex.rs (1961 lines) to FAD.

CODEX CONNECTOR: Parses Codex (OpenAI) session files from ~/.codex/sessions/. Handles Rollout JSONL format (rollout-*.jsonl). UNIQUE FEATURE: Extracts token_count events and attaches token usage metadata to assistant turns.

DEPENDS ON: FAD tasks 1-4

SPECIAL CONSIDERATIONS:
- Rollout JSONL format is specific to Codex — events have types, some are token_count
- Token usage extraction and attachment to message turns is complex parsing logic
- Session file pattern: rollout-*.jsonl
- May have complex event interleaving logic
- CODEX_HOME env var support (already in FAD detection)

Follow migration pattern from FAD task 5.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- CodexConnector compiles in FAD
- Rollout event parsing produces identical output
- Token usage metadata correctly attached to assistant turns
